modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty creating an accessible PDF from Google Docs.

full_description_text:  
I am trying to create an accessible PDF from a Google Doc. I need help figuring out how to do this properly. The process seems unclear, and I want to ensure the PDF meets accessibility standards.
short_description: Difficulty creating an accessible PDF from Google Docs.
description: I am trying to create an accessible PDF from a Google Doc. I need help figuring out how to do this properly. The process seems unclear, and I want to ensure the PDF meets accessibility standards.
